title: 2-Pack Multipurpose Window Squeegee - Turquoise/Grey Durable Shower Squeegees For Mirrors & Tiles - Window Cleaner For Cars, Bathroom & Kitchen
features: Unmatched Quality and Durability: Our rubber squeegee is manufactured from high-quality rubber, ensuring a streak-free and efficient cleaning experience. Our shower squeegee is best for shower doors leaves no streaks of water behind making your shower glass door sparkling clean.

Ergonomic & Stylish: Essentiality professional plastic squeegee with ergonomic design creates maximum cleaning performance with minimum effort. This glass squeegee is lightweight and can easily remove soap foam, water drops and lime scale but leaves NO streaks.

Versatile Cleaning Tool: Essentiality multi-purpose small squeegee is great for cleaning windows, shower doors, car windshield, tile, fogged mirrors, glasses, countertop, patios and more flat or rippled surfaces with our flexible yet strong rubber lip.

Easy Maintenance: Cleaning and maintaining our professional window squeegee is a breeze. The length of 225mm and 250mm wide rubber blade of our shower screen wiper is easy to clean and can be wiped or rinsed off effortlessly after each use. It's also resistant to mold and mildew, ensuring long-lasting performance.

Our Brand’s Mission: Essentiality’s mission is to focus on product durability and after sales service. If you’re not happy from our squeegee, you’re covered by a full refund. Please do not hesitate to contact us with any questions you may have, we are here for support and advice!
description: Product Description Powerful And Thicken Plastic And Silicone ESSENTIALITY Window Cleaning Squeegee Previous page Next page 1 STREAK FREE CLEANING 2 TILES & WALLS 3 BATHROOM MIRRORS 4 CAR WINDSHIELDS 5 GLASS WINDOWS Gentle Care For Glass By using too much force can damage the glass, so it is best to be cautious. Applying gentle force, you can ensure that the glass remains in good condition and free from scratches. With their excellent well-thought-out details and materials, these types of squeegees look presentable. Effortless Cleaning With Premium Rubber Blade Essentiality premium squeegee is a versatile cleaning tool used to make messy windows to shiny & bright. These squeegees will shift the shape of your wet countertop to dry countertop in seconds. Streak-free & Spotless results in surfaces like mirrors, windows, tiles and even car windshields. Is it suitable for outdoor windows or high areas? Yes. It works great on outdoor windows, and if paired with an extendable pole (if compatible), you can easily reach high or large windows. How do I clean and maintain the squeegee? Simply rinse the blade under warm water after each use and hang it to dry. This prevents water spots and keeps the blade in top condition. What surfaces can it be used on? This squeegee can be used on various surfaces such as mirrors, windows, tiles, and car windshields. Use to clean wet countertops after washing dishes. Is it easy to hold? Yes, this squeegee is designed with an ergonomically sturdy handle for a comfortable grip preventing slipping even when wet, so you can clean longer without hand fatigue. Will it scratch my glass or surfaces? No. The soft silicone/rubber blade protects surfaces and ensures smooth, scratch-free cleaning.
